overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through Los Santos International Airport at night. The character exits the arrivals terminal, passes illuminated billboards, walks along the airport road, and discovers a dead body lying on the asphalt while vehicles continue to pass by.

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the terminal's exterior wall, passing illuminated billboards for Badger phones and Air Emu airlines. The walkway is lined with hedge planters and remains partially covered by the building overhang.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the terminal onto the open airport road beneath an elevated terminal structure. A pedestrian stands near a luggage cart on the sidewalk while a black SUV drives past on the multi-lane road, with digital direction signs visible overhead.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open road beneath the terminal overpass and discovers a dead body lying on the asphalt. Vehicles continue to pass by in the background as the character proceeds down the dimly lit airport road with distant city lights visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile, artificial interior of an airport terminal out onto a desolate stretch of open roadway at night. It begins by moving through a covered arrivals area characterized by concrete stairs, support pillars, and glowing digital screens. As the camera exits the terminal, the scene shifts along an exterior wall lined with hedge planters and brightly illuminated billboards for Badger phones and Air Emu. The perspective then emerges from under the building's overhang onto a multi-lane road, passing a pedestrian by a luggage cart as a black SUV drives past beneath overhead direction signs. Finally, the camera proceeds down the dimly lit asphalt under a terminal overpass, discovering a dead body lying on the ground while distant city lights flicker in the background.
